patches.description: Archive WIN-070 new-wins file (git rm). WIN already in wins.json; prevents re-push loop until PROP-048 dedup guard lands.
Updated intermagnet.github.io to intermagnet.org in WIN-053 (1 ref). HTML rebuilt.
Updated GRACE L1A URL to cloud-datasets path in WIN-070 (2 refs). HTML rebuilt.
WIN-070 detail_evidence: corrected "12,150 km of ground track" to "12,150 km of orbital path (≈11,600 km of sub-satellite ground track)" per curmudgeon c7 minor hole.
Accepted social draft: updated "69 dome WIN numbers" to "70 dome WIN numbers" (WIN-070 added).
